thevibecheck.
Hey {$name|there},
Two days ago you signed up. I want to tell you why this project exists.

A while back, I was going through a rough stretch. Not the kind you post about — the quiet kind, where everything looks fine from the outside but inside you're running on empty.

Someone sent me a simple message. Three sentences. It wasn't profound. But it arrived on exactly the right day and it reminded me that someone was thinking about me.

That's it. That was the whole thing. That's why The Vibe Check Project exists.
I built this so that feeling — that "someone sees me" feeling — is something anyone can give to anyone else, for free, in about 60 seconds.
Want to give that feeling to someone today?
Send a Free Card →
Pick someone. Takes one minute. You never know which day is the day someone needed to hear from you.
Talk soon,
Devin
You're receiving this because you signed up at thevibecheckproject.com
